gates.description: ≥2 existing projects (1 CLI + 1 API, each with ≥3 PRD User Stories) run full pipeline (gen-journeys → eval-journey → gen-contracts → eval-contract → gen-test-scripts → run-tests) without errors, generated test code all executable
High-risk Journey test count ≥ low-risk × 1.5, boundary Outcome invalid rate < 20%
New conventions generate ≥3 executable tests on real projects
